titleStmt.title: SII 6.825: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 825. (A.R. No. 284 of 1899). IN THE FIFTEENTH NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1338 gunēṁṭi kā¨rttika
śukla 7 mi budavāranānu Oḍadi pratāpaA¨rjunadēvarā
jula mahādēvi satyamahādēvi tanaku Abhīṣṭa¨rttasiddhi
gānu śrīnarasihyanathuni sanidhi nityaṁmunu veluṁganu Akaṁḍa
dīpamu Okaṭi 1 sama¨rppiṁ cenu Iṁdulakunu mōdalu Ēbhayi 50 peṭi
kāḷupaḍirāyani koḍku ciṁgukhirārivaśānanu peṭi Itaniki kuḍujīta
lakunu Oḍadidēśālōnu lōpuṁḍiceṟuU venaka jalakṣētraṁ puṭa 1 peṭi
timi I dīpānaku Itaṁḍu nityamunu neI Aḍaṁḍu 1 tecci sa
¨rva(va)kala peṭivaḍu nagaranu dīpapratima Okaḍu 1 teci sa
ma¨rppiṁcitimi . tirumaṁjanaAvasaramaṁdu tirumaṁ
janaṁgaraya tēnu dēvakipāpināyani koḍku narisana kuṁ
canu gaṁḍamāḍalu AIdu ma 5 peṭi Atani cētanu naga
ri prasādaṁ kuṁca 1 koni Itaniki peṭitimi Itaḍu nitya
munnu tirumaṁjanapu garaya tecivāḍu . Itirumaṁjanamu
tēnu Oka teṁbhanaḷuvā 1la vi 1 pa 5 . peṭitimi [I]garanu Āsaṁ
da¨rkastaIṁga koluvaṁgalāru I dha¨rmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.825 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
